labels.notes: Jim 3:04 — pulsatile tinnitus follow-up + knee OA + preventive care. Diagnostic 715 (osteoarthritis) and billing A004A both OK. Procedure section hallucinated TWO entries: 'Measured blood pressure' cites 'So I had you at one forty-two over seventy.' and 'Examined ear canal' cites 'So this is the opening to the ear. Yeah.' Both are physical exam steps, NOT billable procedures — the assessment code A004A already covers exam. Same SOAP-procedure-hallucination as Kaden/Cathy/Tammy/Heike — but here the variant is 'physical-exam-as-procedure' rather than 'historical/proposed-as-performed'.
